summary: Frontend smoke test of AudioSystem DSP web app. All 14 critical UI flows passed: app shell load, 16+16 default layout, version switch to 8+8 via confirmation modal, delay value+unit (mm conversion verified: 343mm -> 1.00 ms), mute/fader/gain, EQ 5-band modal with band gain update, Compressor modal toggle, Routing Matrix tab with default cells and click-to-route, Preset save+visible, master mute, and critically the localStorage PERSISTENCE — delay value 7.7 ms set, page reloaded, value restored. The core bug fix ('doesn't save channel delays') is verified resolved.
passed: Default 16 physical + 16 virtual channel strips present
Delay value input updates ms readout (12.5 ms displayed)
Delay unit conversion mm->ms correct (343mm = 1.00 ms, 343 m/s)
Version switch 16+16 -> 8+8 via confirmation modal works (8 phy + 8 virt)
EQ modal opens with 5 bands; band gain slider updates readout (3.0 dB)
Compressor modal opens; comp-enabled toggle and threshold slider work; close works
Routing Matrix tab loads with default IN1->OUT1 cell; cells are clickable
Preset Manager: save with name 'TestPreset1' appears in list
CRITICAL: localStorage persistence — delay 7.7 ms survives page reload
action_items: Minor (non-blocking): Many CSS 'slider-vertical' appearance warnings — deprecated keyword, suggest migrating to writing-mode for future-proofing
Minor (non-blocking): Recharts warning 'width(-1) height(-1)' inside EQ modal on first paint — chart container size resolves on second paint; consider explicit min dims
AudioContext autoplay warning is expected (requires user gesture); engine resumes on interaction per design
